news.title: Lumina Metals, shareholder seek $251 million in Toronto IPO
news.description: Lumina Metals is seeking to raise $343.7 million in an IPO in Toronto, building on a modest recovery in Canadian market debuts. Read more.

news.title: Lumina Metals, Shareholder Seek $251 Million in Toronto IPO
news.description: Lumina Metals Corp. and one of its shareholders are seeking to raise C$343.7 million ($251 million) in an initial public offering in Toronto, building on a modest recovery in Canadian market debuts.
